zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Parton of Sharrington於大約1400年出生在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 本特利時，他的父親Floyd A Parton31歲，母親De Irmingland11歲。他於大約1421年與Katherine Parton在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 本特利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 本特利。

nameMeanings.name: Parton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Parton; most are named with Old English peretūn ‘pear orchard’ (a compound of pere ‘pear’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, with later change of -er- to -ar-, a regular phonetic development in Middle English). There are examples in Gloucestershire, two in Cumbria, and one in Kircudbrightshire, Scotland.

variants.name: Partain
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Parton  .

variants.name: Parten
meanings: German: variant of Parthen, from the personal name Part(h)en, ultimately derived from Greek Parthenios, from parthenos ‘virginal, pure, undefiled’. This was a name borne by two martyrs of the early Christian Church. The surname Parten is very rare in Germany.
English: variant of   Parton  . This surname is very rare in Britain.
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Parten in northern Norway, the definite form singular of part ‘part, parcel (of a property)’. This surname is very rare in Norway.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Parton of Sharrington was born about 1400, in Little Bentley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Floyd A Parton, was 31 and his mother, De Irmingland, was 11. He married Katherine Parton about 1421, in Little Bentley, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1451, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Little Bentley, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Parton of Sharrington est né environ 1400, à Little Bentley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Floyd A Parton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, De Irmingland, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Parton environ 1421, à Little Bentley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Little Bentley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Parton of Sharringtonが約1400年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリーで生まれた時，父Floyd A Partonは31歳，母De Irminglandは11歳であった。約1421年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリーでKatherine Partonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスリットル ベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Parton of Sharrington(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 벤틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Floyd A Parton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 De Irmingland(은)는 11세였다. 그는 대략 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 벤틀리에서 Katherine Parton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 벤틀리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Parton of Sharrington родился около 1400 г. в местности литл бентли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Floyd A Parton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали De Irmingland, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Parton около 1421 г. в местности литл бентли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1451 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности литл бентли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
